title: Backend + Pipeline + DoclingDocument three-layer architecture
detail: Clean separation: backends parse formats, pipelines orchestrate stages, DoclingDocument captures output. FormatOption maps format → backend + pipeline

title: DoclingDocument unified tree representation
detail: Pydantic model with body/furniture separation, hierarchical sections, JSON pointer cross-refs, reading order via tree traversal

title: InputFormat enum with 17 document types
detail: DOCX, PPTX, HTML, IMAGE, PDF, ASCIIDOC, MD, CSV, XLSX, XML_USPTO, XML_JATS, XML_XBRL, METS_GBS, JSON_DOCLING, AUDIO, VTT, LATEX

title: pluggy-based plugin system for extensibility
detail: Third-party OCR/layout/table models via setuptools entrypoints. allow_external_plugins flag. Production-grade extension mechanism

title: Thread-safe production PDF pipeline
detail: Per-run isolation, deterministic run IDs, bounded queues with back-pressure, minimal shared state

title: Separate conversion vs extraction pipelines
detail: document_converter.py for structure, document_extractor.py for data points. Clean separation of concerns

title: VLM pipeline for end-to-end document understanding
detail: Vision-language models (GraniteDocling, SmolDocling) output DocTags directly. Alternative to traditional OCR → layout → table

title: ASR pipeline with unified output
detail: Whisper Turbo → DoclingDocument. Same output as PDF/DOCX. Auto-selects mlx-whisper on Apple Silicon

title: Multi-package ecosystem
detail: docling + docling-core + docling-parse + docling-ibm-models + docling-mcp. Clean boundaries but onboarding complexity

title: LF AI & Data Foundation project
detail: Open governance under Linux Foundation. IBM Research origin but community-governed

title: 40+ page MkDocs documentation site
detail: Concepts, usage, integrations, examples, reference, FAQ. 20+ integration guides

title: 57K stars in <2 years
detail: Exceptional growth. v2.85.0 released today. 201 contributors

title: 875 open issues
detail: Growth outpacing issue triage. Potential maintenance burden signal

title: 55 test files with per-backend coverage
detail: Tests for each backend type, pipeline tests, ASR tests

title: Modern Python tooling: uv + ruff + pydantic v2
MCP server as separate package
detail: docling-mcp wraps conversion as MCP tools. Claude Desktop, LM Studio integration. Agent framework examples
